WITH ranked_publications AS (
  SELECT publication_id,
    ts_rank(description_lexemes, to_tsquery('english', 'best | taste'))
  FROM publication
  WHERE (description ILIKE '%great%' OR description ILIKE '%delicious%') AND (description ILIKE '%food%' OR description ILIKE '%restaurant%')
), ranked_profiles AS (
  SELECT profile_id,
    ts_rank(biography_lexemes, to_tsquery('english', 'best | taste'))
  FROM profile
  WHERE biography ILIKE '%great%' OR biography ILIKE '%delicious%'
), publication_and_profile AS (
  SELECT p.id AS profile_id, p2.id AS publication_id
   FROM ranked_publications AS r2 JOIN publication AS p ON r2.publication_id = p.id
    INNER JOIN ranked_profiles AS rp ON p.profile_id = rp.profile_id
)
SELECT DISTINCT rp.profile_id, rp2.id AS publication_id
FROM publication_and_profile AS rp JOIN profile AS pf ON rp.profile_id = pf.username--
LEFT OUTER JOIN comment AS c ON rp2.id = c.publication_id AND c.annotation ILIKE '%food%' OR c.annotation ilike '%great%'
ORDER BY CASE WHEN rp.rank IS NOT NULL THEN rp.rank ELSE ts_rank(pf.biography_lexemes, to_tsquery('english', 'best | taste')) END DESC, pf.visited_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
